# 4.5. Are the numbers of participants lost to follow-up implausible? <span class="badge badge-draft1">✎ Very rough draft</span>

```{r}
#| include: false
if(file.exists("../_setup.R")){source("../_setup.R")}
```

Consider whether attrition rates are plausible given the context, condition, follow-up duration, and study protocol.
